briefs.title: B.C. Reg. 272/2022 Enacted via Order-in-Council 681/2022 — Details Unavailable
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 272/2022 was enacted via OIC 681/2022 and published in B.C. Gazette No. 23 on December 31. Insufficient detail is available to determine the specific regulatory changes or affected industries.
briefs.action_required: Review the full text of B.C. Reg. 272/2022 in the BC Gazette to determine if your business is affected.
